name: MELLA: Bridging Linguistic Capability and Cultural Groundedness for Low-Resource Language MLLMs
summary: arXiv:2508.05502v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) perform strongly in high-resource languages, yet often produce fluent but culturally "thin" descri...
description: arXiv:2508.05502v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) perform strongly in high-resource languages, yet often produce fluent but culturally "thin" descriptions in low-resource settings. We argue that this failure is not merely a linguistic limitation: culture-specific visual knowledge depends on native visual-textual alignments that translation-centri...
author: Yufei Gao, Jiaying Fei, Nuo Chen, Ruirui Chen, Guohang Yan, Yunshi Lan, Botian Shi
